dublinCore.dc:title: S3706 ENR: Victims' Voices Outside and Inside the Courtroom Effectiveness Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.congress: One Hundred Eighteenth Congress of the United States of America
form.enrolled-dateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Wednesday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty four
form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES
form.official-title: To amend section 3663A of title 18, United States Code, to clarify that restitution includes necessary and reasonable expenses incurred by a person who has assumed the victim's rights.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Victims' Voices Outside and Inside the Courtroom Effectiveness Act or the Victims' VOICES Act.

section.header: Restitution for expenses of persons who have assumed the victim's rights
section.text: Section 3663A(a) of title 18, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: In ordering restitution under this section, a court shall order the defendant to make restitution to a person who has assumed the victim’s rights under paragraph (2) to reimburse that person’s necessary and reasonable—

subparagraph.text: lost income, child care, transportation, and other expenses incurred during and directly related to participation in the investigation or prosecution of the offense or attendance at proceedings related to the offense;

lost income, transportation, and other expenses incurred that are directly related to transporting the victim for necessary medical and related professional services and devices relating to physical, psychiatric, and psychological care, including nonmedical care and treatment rendered in accordance with a method of healing recognized by the law of the place of treatment; and
lost income, transportation, and other expenses incurred that are directly related to transporting the victim to receive necessary physical and occupational therapy and rehabilitation.

attestation-group.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate
